subject: [PATCH pynfs v2 10/25] server41tests: test no notifications without GFLAG_EXTEND

2026-04-16.patch_summary: This patch adds a test to the server41tests suite to verify that when a file is created in a directory for which a delegation has been requested, the server issues a CB_RECALL instead of a CB_NOTIFY if the NOTIFY4_GFLAG_EXTEND flag is not set. The test requests a delegation with the NOTIFY4_ADD_ENTRY flag but without the NOTIFY4_GFLAG_EXTEND flag and checks that the expected callback is received.
